title: EU lawmakers adopt digital assets policy stance after MiCA transition ends
summary: EU lawmakers adopt digital assets policy stance after MiCA transition ends
briefing: The European Parliament adopted a digital assets report calling for further assessment of DeFi, staking, crypto lending and NFTs after MiCA’s transition period ended.

title: Coinbase gets UK license to expand into derivatives, equities
summary: Coinbase gets UK license to expand into derivatives, equities
briefing: Coinbase said its UK investment services authorization will allow institutional and advanced traders to access derivatives, while retail users will be able to trade equities.

title: Ctrl Wallet to shut weeks after security exploit
summary: Ctrl Wallet to shut weeks after security exploit
briefing: The move follows a June 23 exploit that has now resulted in closing down the wallet, with users urged to withdraw their assets before all functions are disabled on Aug. 3, 2026.

title: Vitalik Buterin confirms AI identified his anonymous Ethereum proposal contribution
summary: Vitalik Buterin confirms AI identified his anonymous Ethereum proposal contribution
briefing: The Ethereum co-founder said AI recognized his intellectual habits, ending a two-week public challenge to identify an anonymous contribution he made.

title: Bitcoin can fall below $58K if one of its 'cleanest' metrics copies history: Analysis
summary: Bitcoin can fall below $58K if one of its 'cleanest' metrics copies history: Analysis
briefing: Bitcoin NUPL metric data suggested that BTC price action should make new cycle lows in order to preserve historical patterns.

title: Digital Chamber amicus brief urges dismissal of NY lawsuit over 39,069 Bitcoin wallets
summary: Digital Chamber amicus brief urges dismissal of NY lawsuit over 39,069 Bitcoin wallets
briefing: The Digital Chamber filed an amicus brief urging the dismissal of the New York lawsuit seeking ownership of 39,069 dormant Bitcoin wallets, arguing it would set a dangerous precedent for self-custodial wallets.

title: MiCA-compliant euro stablecoins grew 128% before MiCA transition ended, says Decta
summary: MiCA-compliant euro stablecoins grew 128% before MiCA transition ended, says Decta
briefing: Decta's report said the market cap of eight MiCA-compliant euro stablecoins rose to $673.9 million in the year before Europe’s CASP transition period ended.

title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Here’s what happened in crypto today
briefing: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Morning Minute: Strategy Turns Net Seller
summary: Morning Minute: Strategy Turns Net Seller
briefing: Michael Saylor becomes a major Bitcoin seller. A memecoin gets "exploited" via governance. And Bernstein doubles down on a $150k BTC call.

title: Traders Sue Polymarket Over 'No' Ruling on Strategy Bitcoin Sale
summary: Traders Sue Polymarket Over 'No' Ruling on Strategy Bitcoin Sale
briefing: The plaintiffs say Polymarket added a rule after the fact, turning their winning "Yes" bet on Strategy's Bitcoin sale into a loss.

title: Chainwire Parent MediaFuse Launches Tech Newswire Optimized for AI Search
summary: Chainwire Parent MediaFuse Launches Tech Newswire Optimized for AI Search
briefing: TechnologyWire pitches guaranteed placement across tech media, alongside content tuned to be picked up by tools like ChatGPT and Gemini.

title: ByteDance and Alibaba to Pull Agent Features as China Cracks Down on Humanlike AI
summary: ByteDance and Alibaba to Pull Agent Features as China Cracks Down on Humanlike AI
briefing: Beijing's first rules targeting emotional AI are forcing the country's biggest apps to shut down custom agents.

title: UK Foreign Secretary Warns of 'AI Hiroshima' if Policymakers Don’t Act
summary: UK Foreign Secretary Warns of 'AI Hiroshima' if Policymakers Don’t Act
briefing: Yvette Cooper said governments must agree on AI safeguards before frontier systems transform warfare, crime, and society.

title: Solana Meme Coin Bonk Treasury Drained of $20 Million in 'Malicious' Governance Attack
summary: Solana Meme Coin Bonk Treasury Drained of $20 Million in 'Malicious' Governance Attack
briefing: The Bonk DAO wallet was exploited for roughly $20 million worth of the prominent dog-themed meme coin on Solana.

title: 'We Cannot Vibe Code the Future of Humanity', UN Chief Warns at AI Summit
summary: 'We Cannot Vibe Code the Future of Humanity', UN Chief Warns at AI Summit
briefing: António Guterres borrowed a Silicon Valley meme to make the starkest case yet for global AI oversight—then called for an international ban on killer robots.

title: Bitcoin Hits Highest Price in Weeks as Bernstein Analysts Maintain 'Ambitious' $150K Target
summary: Bitcoin Hits Highest Price in Weeks as Bernstein Analysts Maintain 'Ambitious' $150K Target
briefing: The financial firm admitted Bitcoin's retrace has been painful, but still holds a lofty year-end price prediction for the top crypto asset.
